description_long: This airplane features a highly angular, futuristic design with sharp, faceted surfaces and a striking color palette of metallic silver, purple, and black. The fuselage is sleek and streamlined, with pronounced geometric edges and a pointed nose. The wings are swept back aggressively, with additional angular extensions and winglets that enhance its aerodynamic appearance. The tail section is equally sharp, with a prominent vertical stabilizer and multiple fin-like protrusions. The surface finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the prismatic color shifts across its panels. No visible engines or landing gear are apparent, giving the aircraft a stylized, almost sci-fi aesthetic.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with sharp, faceted surfaces in metallic silver, purple, and black, featuring swept-back wings and a pointed nose.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the airplane, highlighting the sharp, angular wings and tail, as well as the prismatic color pattern.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, narrow fuselage, and the symmetry of the angular wing extensions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the swept-back wings and geometric tail design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the vertical stabilizer, tail fins, and the layered, faceted structure of the airplane's back end.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and pronounced winglets; features multiple geometric extensions and a faceted design.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the exterior.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with multiple angular fin-like extensions, forming a stylized conventional tail.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the angular fuselage with a faceted canopy.
